description_long: This is a cylindrical aluminum can with a vibrant, dark purple background and Halloween-themed graphics. The front displays bold white and green text reading 'ROXX ZOMBIE JUICE' with 'SABOR ORIGINAL' above, surrounded by spider webs, bats, and a graveyard silhouette. One side of the can features a haunted house with glowing yellow windows, more bats, and a cross, enhancing the spooky theme. The can has a standard metallic pull tab on top, typical of beverage cans. The surface appears smooth and glossy, reflecting light subtly. The overall design is eye-catching and playful, likely appealing to a younger audience or for themed events.
description: A dark purple aluminum can labeled 'ROXX ZOMBIE JUICE' with Halloween-themed graphics, including bats, spider webs, and a haunted house. The can has a glossy finish and a metallic pull tab on top.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main label with 'ROXX ZOMBIE JUICE', 'SABOR ORIGINAL', and prominent Halloween graphics including bats and spider webs.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the spider web, bats, and a graveyard silhouette with a cross, with part of the main label text visible.
description_view_2: The back view primarily displays the purple background with a partial graveyard scene and minimal text or branding.
description_view_3: This view features a haunted house with glowing yellow windows, bats, and the edge of the main label, emphasizing the spooky theme.
